text: You activate Mirror Force, your opponent chains Mystical Space Typhoon targeting your Mirror Force: does Mystical Space Typhoon prevent their monsters from being destroyed?
options: Yes, Mystical Space Typhoon negates Mirror Force
No, Mirror Force isn't negated and destroys all their monsters in Attack Position
explanation: Mystical Space Typhoon doesn't negate, it only destroys.

text: Can you set a Spell Card and activate it later in the same turn?
options: No, you have to wait until your next turn
Yes, all Spell Cards can be activated the same turn they've been set
Yes, but not if they're Quick-Play Spell Cards
Yes, but only if they're Quick-Play Spell Cards

text: Does a Tribute Summon count as a Normal Summon?
options: Yes, so you can't Tribute Summon if you've already Normal Summoned this turn
No, Tribute Summon is a form of Special Summon, you can perform as many Tribute Summons as you want
Yes, it's a Normal Summon but you can perform it in addition to your Normal Summon
Yes, it's a Normal Summon but you can perform it in addition to your Normal Summon if the monster you're going to Tribute has been on the field for at least 1 turn and didn't attack

text: You Normal Summon Armageddon Knight and use its effect to send a DARK monster from the Deck to the GY. Your opponent wants to activate Trap Hole in response to Armageddon Knight's effect: how does the chain resolve?
options: You send a DARK monster from the Deck to the GY and then Trap Hole destroys Armageddon Knight
Trap Hole destroys Armageddon Knight but then you can't send a DARK monster because Armageddon Knight is no longer on the field
Trap Hole destroys Armageddon Knight and then you send a DARK monster from the Deck
Trap Hole activation is illegal because Armageddon Knight's Summon effect has priority and makes it miss timing

text: Can you activate Trap Stun, a Normal Trap Card, to negate Solemn Judgment (a Counter Trap Card)?
options: Yes, you can
No, you can't but you could if Trap Stun negated activation of Trap Cards and not just their effects
No, you can't, you can only chain another Counter Trap Card to Solemn Judgment

text: Can you activate a Field Spell like Skyscraper if you already have 5 cards in your Spell/Trap Zones?
options: Yes, you can because Field Spells have their dedicated Zone
Field Spells have their dedicated Zone but you still can't have more than 5 Spell/Traps in your Zones
No, you can't

text: Can you activate Lightning Vortex if your opponent doesn't have a face-up monster on their field?
options: Yes, you can if your goal is just to discard a card
No, you can't
Yes, you can if your opponent has at least a face-down monster on the field

text: Can you activate Lyla, Lightsworn Sorceress in response to something?
options: Yes, you can because monster effects are Spell Speed 2 unless specified otherwise
No, you can't because monster effects are Spell Speed 1
Yes, you can but only during your turn

text: You have 5 monsters on the field: can you Tribute Summon a monster?
options: No
Yes
Only if it's a monster that requires 2 Tributes
Only if it's a Divine Beast
